name: accent_dot_dangyou_unknown

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.21 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] #331 negative case: a `段目` table-row reference with word-qualified selectors (`Sinhaのn`, `Visnuのsn`) addresses letters of named words in a table, not the adjacent run. Its `、`-split pieces are not pure ASCII-letter selectors, so the directive stays Directive{Unknown}, rendered as a hidden raw span and serialized verbatim.

source: Sinha［＃４段目、Sinhaのnは上ドット付き、Visnuのsnはともに下ドット付き］

expected.html: Sinha［＃４段目、Sinhaのnは上ドット付き、Visnuのsnはともに下ドット付き］
expected.serialize: Sinha［＃４段目、Sinhaのnは上ドット付き、Visnuのsnはともに下ドット付き］
